issues.description: Action should be 'PlayFromHand' or similar to 'Set this Character as active', not 'FlipLife'. FlipLife is for converting Life cards to DON cards. The primary effect is setting the character as active (resting it).
Missing condition for 'Once Per Turn' restriction. Should include appropriate turn-tracking condition.
Missing cost specification. The card requires resting 1 DON card (➀), which should be reflected in conditions or a separate cost mechanism.
The effect has two components: (1) optionally add 1 Life card to hand, AND (2) set this character as active. Current DSL only captures FlipLife and misses the 'Rest' action for setting active.
